In the Press

Media Coverage

IIT Delhi Newsletter December 2023

OpenVLM Toolkit crosses 1,000 GitHub stars — an IIT Delhi open-source success story

The IIT Delhi research newsletter featured the OpenVLM Toolkit's milestones, community adoption by researchers at 30+ institutions, and the importance of open-source research infrastructure.

Scientist & Assistant Professor, CSIR-NIDSA & AcSIR
